steps.title: Avoid a comma splice
steps.content: The sentence already has an independent clause before the comma: this period in automotive design is remembered for its grandeur and artistry. After the comma, the words its vehicles need to begin a nonfinite absolute phrase, not another full independent clause.

steps.title: Remove finite verb forms
steps.content: Choice A uses are, creating a second independent clause after only a comma. Choice B uses had been, creating the same comma-splice problem. Choice D uses were, another finite verb that creates an independent clause. The answer is C.
